hero.subheading: Complete plant nutrition solutions for every crop. From field to greenhouse, ActiveAgro stands by you at every stage.

features.heading: Quality. Science. Results.
features.body: We partner with leading European producers and deliver solutions based on the real needs of each crop.

scientific.title: Science-backed
scientific.body: Formulations based on analytics and real-world field results.

ecological.title: Eco-friendly
ecological.body: Low-footprint options and certified organic alternatives.

everyCrop.title: For every crop
everyCrop.body: Tailored formulas for olive, vine, orchards, vegetables and cereals.

support.title: Technical support
support.body: Our agronomists at your service — on-site visits and advice.

aboutTeaser.heading: Standing by Greek growers since 1995.
aboutTeaser.body: We started as a small family business with one goal: to bring the best European fertilizers to Greek soil. Today, three decades later, we serve thousands of growers across Greece with the same commitment to quality.

contactCta.heading: Ready for the right solution?
contactCta.body: Talk to our agronomists. We'll recommend the right formula for your crop — free of charge.

hero.intro: Since 1995, ActiveAgro has been bringing leading European fertilizers and nutritional solutions to Greek growers. With knowledge, passion, and a scientific mindset.

manifesto.heading: We grow relationships, not just products.
paragraphs: We believe fertilizer isn't just a product — it's the foundation of a healthy crop. A crop that feeds families, supports local economies, and keeps the Greek countryside alive.

That's why, for 30 years, we've carefully chosen which European producers we bring to Greece. We only partner with those who share our values: uncompromising quality, environmental respect, and real know-how.

And the result? Thousands of growers across Greece trust us not only for our products, but for the advice that comes with them. For the agronomist who picks up the phone. For the on-site visit that makes the difference.
manifesto.highlight: We don't sell fertilizers. We support crops.

items.title: Scientific approach
items.body: Every recommendation is backed by analytics, studies, and real field results.

items.title: Local knowledge
items.body: We know the specifics of every Greek crop — because we've been here since 1995.

items.title: Uncompromising quality
items.body: We only partner with leading European producers. No shortcuts on standards.

items.title: Environmental respect
items.body: We choose low-footprint products and support organic farming.

items.title: Continuous learning
items.body: Our agronomists train constantly to bring you the most up-to-date solutions.

items.title: Partnership
items.body: We're not just suppliers. We're allies of the grower — from sowing to harvest.

milestones.title: We begin
milestones.body: ActiveAgro is founded as a small family-run fertilizer trading business.

milestones.title: First European partnership
milestones.body: We sign exclusive distribution with a leading Spanish maker of specialty water-soluble fertilizers.

milestones.title: Nationwide coverage
milestones.body: We expand to 12 regions with a network of 800+ active partners.

milestones.title: New logistics hub
milestones.body: We open a state-of-the-art 5,000m² warehouse for faster nationwide delivery.

milestones.title: Technical support team
milestones.body: Our agronomy team begins free on-site farm visits across the country.

milestones.title: Next generation
milestones.body: We launch our new biostimulants line and a new digital channel for grower communication.

approach.heading: From the field, to the field.

steps.title: We listen
steps.body: We talk with the grower. We understand the crop, the soil, the challenges.

steps.title: We analyze
steps.body: We evaluate plant physiology and soil data.

steps.title: We recommend
steps.body: We design a tailored nutrition plan, backed by science.

steps.title: We follow up
steps.body: We track progress — back to the field as many times as needed.

hero.heading: Nutrition solutions for every crop.
hero.intro: Explore our full range. Filter by category, form, or search to find what you need.

empty.title: No products found
empty.body: Try changing your filters or clearing the search.

hero.heading: Field wisdom, every week.
hero.intro: Growing tips, new products, events, and practical nutrition guidance from our team.

empty.title: No articles yet
empty.body: We'll soon publish helpful content for every crop.

hero.heading: Let's talk.
hero.intro: Whether you're looking for the right nutrition plan for your crop, or want to become our partner, we're here. Send us a message or call us.
